text:
Money that is required to be deposited in the state treasury to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund may be used by the department only:

(1) to support the department’s operations and the administration and enforcement of the department’s functions; or

(2) to pay the accounting costs and related liabilities for the fund, including fringe benefits, workers’ compensation, and unemployment compensation.
markdown:
# Transp. Code
## Title 7
### Chapter 1001. Org. of Dept.
##### § 1001.152 — Use of Money in Fund

Money that is required to be deposited in the state treasury to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund may be used by the department only:

    (1) to support the department’s operations and the administration and enforcement of the department’s functions; or

    (2) to pay the accounting costs and related liabilities for the fund, including fringe benefits, workers’ compensation, and unemployment compensation.

*Added by Acts 2013, 83rd Leg., R.S., Ch. 1287 (H.B.2202), Sec. 71, eff. September 1, 2013.*

subsections.text: Money that is required to be deposited in the state treasury to the credit of the Texas Department of Motor Vehicles fund may be used by the department only:
to support the department’s operations and the administration and enforcement of the department’s functions; or
to pay the accounting costs and related liabilities for the fund, including fringe benefits, workers’ compensation, and unemployment compensation.
